Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-10_13-03-01_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7/src/claim-office.ts

A customer with priorContracts >= 1 (follow-up) AND firstInsurance: true (because each item is treated as first insurance per spec) gets BOTH the +10% first-insurance and the -15% follow-up.

Use customer {yearsWithMHPCO: 0, priorContracts: 1, firstInsurance: true}, item: plain sword.
Calculation: 100 base + 10 first-ins - 15 follow-up + 5 fee = 100 G.
Expected: {premium: 100}.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim.

content.text:
Interesting — the test passed! Let me verify the calculation: 100 base + 10 first-ins (10% of 100) - 15 follow-up (15% of 100) + 5 fee = 100 G. The current implementation already handles this correctly because both `firstInsuranceAdjustment` and `followUpAdjustment` apply independently based on the customer fields, and they both apply to the same `policyBase`.

This means the test actually passes immediately with the current implementation. The current implementation already correctly stacks both modifiers. Let me re-make my predictions accordingly.

- Actual value: { premium: 100 }
